recommendations.overview: A boy experiences first love, friendships and injustices growing up in 1960s Taiwan.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Andhadhun

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.
